address.address: #75, Muthugadahalli, Bangalore North Jala Hobli, Near International Airport India
address.location: #1 & 2, Opp to KHB Quarters' Main Gate, KHB Main Road, R.T. Nagar Post

pos_sentences.text: Strong network with industry leader and alumni, facilitating job placements. Comprehensive career services offering workshops
pos_sentences.name: DEVRAJ SINGH

pos_sentences.text: College faculty is good. They have great teaching experience. They are very friendly with student. And they wanted to gave more knowledge to the student . They have great teaching experience upto 10 to 12 years. And they manages student very well.
pos_sentences.name: Aakanksha Patil

pos_sentences.text: Placement and infrastructure and course structure that is very exciting for the student . Compare to the other college college provide great placement facility.
pos_sentences.name: Aakanksha Patil

pos_sentences.text: Activites and other programs is also good
pos_sentences.name: Shivam Raj

pos_sentences.text: Experienced faculty and they will clarify the doubts in the classroom itself
pos_sentences.name: GUNDAPU SAISANDHYA

pos_sentences.text: Library was good with more journals and books
pos_sentences.name: GUNDAPU SAISANDHYA

pos_sentences.text: MBA include skill certification programme that help to future placement purpose.
pos_sentences.name: Darshan s

pos_sentences.text: Sports been conducted my the mangment and faculty
pos_sentences.name: Chilla Hari Charan

pos_sentences.text: Lab facilities are good,library and sports field are also good
pos_sentences.name: Spoorthy C L

pos_sentences.text: Support from the staff feels very good and motivating.
pos_sentences.name: N Nikhilesh Maruthi

pos_sentences.text: College provides with the paid stipends internships
pos_sentences.name: N Nikhilesh Maruthi

neg_sentences.text: Foreign trip is not for everyone it is only for top 100 students.
neg_sentences.name: Shivam Raj

neg_sentences.text: The fee structure is little bit higher than other.
neg_sentences.name: Shivam Raj

neg_sentences.text: Some courses may seem outdated or not aligned with current industry trends
neg_sentences.name: DEVRAJ SINGH

neg_sentences.text: No importance is given to extra curricular activities
neg_sentences.name: Sanchari maji

neg_sentences.text: Give the certification cource by group of 20 to 30 students
neg_sentences.name: Darshan s

neg_sentences.text: Taking a pg near the college is a bad idea as there arent any facilities nearby....even to go to a proper hospital you would have to travel atleast 10km.
neg_sentences.name: Joseph

neg_sentences.text: There is a transportation problem because hostels are too far
neg_sentences.name: GUNDAPU SAISANDHYA

neg_sentences.text: Not everyone is eligible for the laptop.
neg_sentences.name: Shivam Raj

neg_sentences.text: Their is no specific sports area for the student
neg_sentences.name: Aakanksha Patil
